item.title: Recreating Alia Bhatt's 3-Step Glow Makeup!
item.description: Recreate the famous three-step "glow" routine inspired by Bollywood star Alia Bhatt. This tutorial covers skin prepping, mixing illuminators, and tips for adapting the look to your own skin texture.

media:content.media:title: Recreating Alia Bhatt's 3-Step Glow Makeup!
media:content.media:description: Recreate the famous three-step "glow" routine inspired by Bollywood star Alia Bhatt. This tutorial covers skin prepping, mixing illuminators, and tips for adapting the look to your own skin texture.

item.title: I Just Love This Floating Eyeliner!
item.description: Step up your makeup game with the floating eyeliner look. This tutorial guides you through the precise placement and blending needed to achieve this modern, graphic eye makeup style.

media:content.media:title: I Just Love This Floating Eyeliner!
media:content.media:description: Step up your makeup game with the floating eyeliner look. This tutorial guides you through the precise placement and blending needed to achieve this modern, graphic eye makeup style.

item.title: Become a Makeup Pro With These Easy Hacks
item.description: Elevate your beauty routine with these expert-approved makeup techniques. From perfecting your base to mastering seamless blending, these simple hacks help you achieve a polished, professional look.

media:content.media:title: Become a Makeup Pro With These Easy Hacks
media:content.media:description: Elevate your beauty routine with these expert-approved makeup techniques. From perfecting your base to mastering seamless blending, these simple hacks help you achieve a polished, professional look.

item.title: Quick everyday neutral makeup for work
item.description: A simple, polished office-ready makeup look using soft neutral tones and no foundation for a fresh, natural finish.

media:content.media:title: Quick everyday neutral makeup for work
media:content.media:description: A simple, polished office-ready makeup look using soft neutral tones and no foundation for a fresh, natural finish.

item.title: Hooded eyes? This blue trick changes everything
item.description: A simple technique using blue tones to enhance hooded eyes, helping define the shape and make the eye look stand out beautifully.

media:content.media:title: Hooded eyes? This blue trick changes everything
media:content.media:description: A simple technique using blue tones to enhance hooded eyes, helping define the shape and make the eye look stand out beautifully.

item.title: 5 must-know wedding day hacks for brides
item.description: I’ve curated five professional strategies to help you maintain a polished look from the ceremony to the reception. These are the specific methods I use to guarantee long-lasting beauty.

media:content.media:title: 5 must-know wedding day hacks for brides
media:content.media:description: I’ve curated five professional strategies to help you maintain a polished look from the ceremony to the reception. These are the specific methods I use to guarantee long-lasting beauty.

item.title: Make your eyeshadow pop instantly with super shock
item.description: A quick makeup tip showing how Super Shock shadows can boost color payoff and add instant intensity to any eye look.

media:content.media:title: Make your eyeshadow pop instantly with super shock
media:content.media:description: A quick makeup tip showing how Super Shock shadows can boost color payoff and add instant intensity to any eye look.

item.title: Bridal Makeup Starts With Skin And Here’s Why
item.description: I believe a stunning bridal look begins long before the foundation. I’m explaining why I focus on skin preparation to ensure your makeup stays flawless and radiant throughout your big day.

media:content.media:title: Bridal Makeup Starts With Skin And Here’s Why
media:content.media:description: I believe a stunning bridal look begins long before the foundation. I’m explaining why I focus on skin preparation to ensure your makeup stays flawless and radiant throughout your big day.

item.title: This Eyeliner Is For The Hooded Eyes!
item.description: Learn how to perfect your winged liner with this makeup tutorial designed specifically for eyeliner for hooded eyes! This easy-to-follow how to do winged eyeliner guide will give you the best beginner eyeliner tips, and help you master the winged liner look. Say goodbye to smudged eyeliner and hello to flawless makeup for hooded eyes!

media:content.media:title: This Eyeliner Is For The Hooded Eyes!
media:content.media:description: Learn how to perfect your winged liner with this makeup tutorial designed specifically for eyeliner for hooded eyes! This easy-to-follow how to do winged eyeliner guide will give you the best beginner eyeliner tips, and help you master the winged liner look. Say goodbye to smudged eyeliner and hello to flawless makeup for hooded eyes!

item.title: The NEW way I have been wearing my eyeliner!
item.description: I’ve been experimenting with a different eyeliner technique lately, and I’m obsessed with the results. Join me as I show you how I’m updating my look for a more lifted and modern finish.

media:content.media:title: The NEW way I have been wearing my eyeliner!
media:content.media:description: I’ve been experimenting with a different eyeliner technique lately, and I’m obsessed with the results. Join me as I show you how I’m updating my look for a more lifted and modern finish.

item.title: Stunning pre-wedding glam recreation
item.description: A bridal-inspired glam makeup look recreated step by step, featuring soft glow, defined eyes, and a flawless finish perfect for a pre-wedding event.

media:content.media:title: Stunning pre-wedding glam recreation
media:content.media:description: A bridal-inspired glam makeup look recreated step by step, featuring soft glow, defined eyes, and a flawless finish perfect for a pre-wedding event.
